title: Complete the Endpoint
description:
Welcome to Rank Challenge. The finale. This Express route loads a user from the database and returns it, but it is missing everything that makes a route robust.

Make the handler `async`, wrap the awaited `db.getUser(id)` in a `try/catch`, and reply with `res.json(...)`. The starter currently uses a synchronous lookup and `res.send`.
hints: An async handler can `await db.getUser(id)`; wrap it in `try/catch` to handle rejection.
On success call `res.json(user)`; in `catch` send an error status.
